typography.heading_rules: Use tracking-tight for all headings. Maximum heading size is text-5xl.
typography.body_rules: Use leading-relaxed for long text, clean legible sizes like text-sm for tables.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards, gap-6 or gap-8 in grids.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Subtle border-zinc-200 everywhere instead of heavy shadows. rounded-md or rounded-sm for a sharp, technical SaaS feel.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal shadows. Prefer flat, 1px bordered containers. For floating elements, use shadow-sm.

components.dashboard_grid: Gridcols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. First row for key metrics (upcoming events, pending payments), next row for a wider table/list of recent reservations.
components.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Clean rows with border-b, no vertical lines. Status badges should be minimal (e.g., small dot + text or a subtly colored background badge).
components.forms: Left-aligned labels. Use Shadcn Input, Select, DatePicker. Subdued borders (border-zinc-300).
components.buttons: Sharp corners or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Primary buttons should be deep black (#0A0A0A) with white text. Secondary buttons white with 1px border.
components.calendar: Shadcn Calendar component in a full-page view or card. Highlight booked dates clearly.
components.receipt_upload: Use a subtle dashed border dropzone area. Show a thumbnail grid once uploaded.
components.navigation: Top navigation or sleek minimal sidebar. White background, 1px bottom or right border.

motion.hover_states: Subtle background color shifts on rows and buttons. No heavy translations or scales.

event_placeholder.description: Elegant table setting placeholder for event details without an uploaded image.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA contrast for text. Avoid light gray text on white background.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based) on all interactive elements: buttons, inputs, table rows, links, tabs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design a minimalist Spanish-language dashboard for managing event reservations.
Implement 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Satoshi' for body text. Do not use 'Inter'.
Create a clean Layout shell (Sidebar or Topnav) showing 'Dashboard', 'Reservaciones', 'Calendario'.
Dashboard page: Overview cards (Próximos eventos, Pagos pendientes, Total) and a summary table.
Reservations page: A detailed table showing Client, Date, Event Type, Total, Advance, and Status (Pendiente, Confirmado, Completado, Cancelado).
Reservation Detail view: Show all details and include an Image Upload section for 'Comprobantes de Pago' (Payment Receipts).
Forms: Implement a New/Edit Reservation form supporting all required fields (client info, event type, date/time, venue, guests, total amount, advance paid, notes).
Calendar: Display a monthly view with visual indicators for reserved dates.
Styling: Keep it strictly high-contrast, 'Swiss minimalist' style. Use sharp lines (rounded-md max), 1px borders, and flat designs instead of heavy drop shadows.
Ensure all interactive elements have valid data-testid attributes.
